summary.zh: 方块人 3D 角色编辑器,做可动的参数化低多边形人形。源数据是 LowPolySource JSON(关节绑骨 + 部件几何 + 动画 clip)且作为唯一 SSOT;支持 vibe 自然语言生成/修改角色,以及 Blender 风 gizmo 手编(选件 + G/R/S 轴锁 + 镜像 + 捕捉),内置第三人称 Playground 用 WASD 验证骨骼动画。three.js 实时预览,烘焙为引擎中立的 .glb(含骨骼动画)/ .obj,骨架命名兼容 Mixamo。
summary.en: A lowpoly humanoid 3D character editor for animatable parametric block humanoids. The source is a LowPolySource JSON (joints + part geometry + animation clips) as the single source of truth; it supports vibe natural-language authoring/editing and Blender-style gizmo manual editing (part select + G/R/S axis lock + mirror + snapping), with a third-person playground to test rig animation via WASD. three.js live preview, baking to engine-neutral .glb (with skeleton+anim) / .obj, with Mixamo-compatible bone naming.

body.zh:
vibe 自然语言 + Blender 风 gizmo 手编
第三人称 Playground 验证动画
body.en:
vibe natural-language + Blender-style gizmo
third-person playground to test animation

body.zh:
JSON 为唯一 SSOT → 烘焙 .glb / .obj
three.js 预览;Mixamo 命名兼容
body.en:
JSON SSOT → bake .glb / .obj
three.js preview; Mixamo-compatible naming

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开「wb-lowpoly-obj」面板
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'wb-lowpoly-obj' panel

notes.zh: 首版:参数化方块人编辑器
